Auth.startJourney: Start your job search journey now.
Auth.verifyEmailPrompt: We have sent a verification email to {email}. Please check your inbox.
Auth.verifyEmailSpam: If you haven't received the email, check your spam folder or try sending it again.

Jobs.title: Find Your Next Job
Jobs.noMoreJobs: No more jobs for now! Check back later.

Landing.heroTitle: Feel the beat. Lead the line. Find an internship.
Landing.heroSubtitle: Find a job without stressing. Download your portfolio, and start working now.
Landing.featureText: The platform evaluates the progress of the student's portfolio against millions of data points to identify the most suitable candidates for vacancy announcements.
Landing.skillsText: Forget static PDFs. BeatPen provides a dynamic, real-time visualization of your skills, making it easier for recruiters to see your potential and how fast you're learning.
Landing.ctaText: Get your portfolio in front of the right people. No more getting lost in HR filters or endless applications.

Profile.noBio: No bio yet. Add one in settings!

Settings.title: Settings
Settings.professionalDescription: Update your professional information to share with recruiters.
Settings.resumeDescription: Upload your resume (PDF). This will be visible to recruiters.
Settings.editProfileDescription: Make changes to your public profile.
Settings.bioPlaceholder: Tell recruiters about yourself, your skills, and career goals.
Settings.deleteAccountDescription: Permanently delete your account and all your data.
